v1_boundary: UK Peppol readiness XML only. Generated using Peppol BIS / EN16931-style structure based on currently announced UK Peppol direction. This does not prove final UK 2029 statutory compliance.
v1_boundary_warning: UK Peppol readiness XML only. Generated using Peppol BIS / EN16931-style structure based on currently announced UK Peppol direction. This does not prove final UK 2029 statutory compliance.
legal_regime_summary: The UK pack is a 2029 Peppol roadmap pack. It records announced direction and now supports a local UK Peppol readiness XML output only; it does not implement final UK statutory compliance.
scope: UK mandatory e-invoicing is planned for 2029.
Detailed UK technical standards are still pending.
This app currently generates a readiness XML file only for UK at this stage.
mandatory_format: Peppol has been announced as the UK's core interoperability network.
Final UK technical standards, profiles and implementation artefacts are not yet configured in this app.
UK output is a Peppol BIS / EN16931-style readiness XML file only.
transmission_or_clearance_model: The UK is expected to follow a decentralised Peppol-style exchange model.
The UK roadmap pack does not model a Saudi-style tax authority clearance flow.
No live Peppol transmission, HMRC submission, clearance or real-time reporting is implemented.
qr_signature_requirements: No UK QR requirement is configured for this roadmap pack.
No UK production signing, statutory approval or real-time reporting requirement is implemented.
retention_or_audit_notes: Evidence must state that UK readiness XML does not prove final UK 2029 compliance.
Evidence must not contain Storecove API keys or secrets.
Official validation remains not configured until UK artefacts and real validator outputs are available.
v1_app_capability: UK workbook upload, canonical invoice JSON construction, local readiness validation and readiness XML generation are available.
Generated UK XML is for demonstration and readiness testing only.
No UK production Peppol transmission, HMRC submission, statutory compliance proof or live acceptance is available.

official_sources.label: Open items and deferred country packs

boundary_highlights: No final UK 2029 statutory compliance claim.
No production Peppol transmission or HMRC submission.
